risks: The 5-tab system touches GameHeader, SidePanel, GamePage, and types.ts simultaneously — type inconsistencies break compilation.
Projects and Wiki panels need store data — need to verify workState coverage for goals, features, lessons.
Scope creep: each panel could expand into multi-day effort. Keep focused on minimum viable interaction.
over_engineering_flags: Shared drill-down pattern could be over-engineered into generic component. Inline state per panel is simpler.
Team panel redesign is mostly refinement of existing activity-first layout, not a rewrite.

initiatives.title: Update HUD types and header buttons for 5-tab system
initiatives.user_scenario: CEO sees 5 buttons in the header — Team, Inbox, Projects, Intel, Wiki — with appropriate icons and badge on Inbox.
initiatives.scope: Update HudPanel type in GameHeader.tsx to include all 5 tabs. Replace lucide icons. Update SidePanel.tsx types and mappings. Update TileType in types.ts. Update GamePage.tsx type maps.
definition_of_done: HudPanel and HudTab types include all 5 tabs
GameHeader renders 5 HudButtons with correct icons
TileType includes hud-team, hud-inbox, hud-projects, hud-intel, hud-wiki
SidePanel and GamePage mappings updated
TypeScript compiles

initiatives.title: Wire SidePanel content routing for 5 tabs
initiatives.user_scenario: Clicking any header button opens the corresponding panel content in the side panel with tab strip.
initiatives.scope: Update PanelContent to route all 5 tabs. Import new panel components (stub if needed). Ensure tab strip renders all 5 tabs.
definition_of_done: PanelContent routes all 5 tab values
Tab strip renders 5 tabs
App compiles and each button shows corresponding tab

initiatives.title: Polish Team panel activity-first layout
initiatives.user_scenario: CEO opens Team tab and sees working agents prominently with their current task, while idle agents collapse into a compact row.
initiatives.scope: Polish existing TeamPanel: show full task name, add time-since-started for working agents. Core layout already correct.
definition_of_done: Working agents show full task name
Working agent cards show time-since-started
Idle agents in compact grid
Renders correctly with 0 active agents

initiatives.title: Build Inbox panel (rename from Decisions)
initiatives.user_scenario: CEO opens Inbox tab and sees actionable items with enough context to act.
initiatives.scope: Create InboxPanel.tsx from DecisionsPanel. Rename, update empty state. Export from index.ts.
definition_of_done: InboxPanel.tsx exists and exports from panels/index.ts
Shows approvals, errors, waiting-input with context
Routed correctly from SidePanel tab

initiatives.title: Build Projects drill-down panel
initiatives.user_scenario: CEO opens Projects tab, sees goals, drills into projects, sees tasks with DOD and progress. Back button at each level.
initiatives.scope: Create ProjectsPanel.tsx with 3-level drill-down: goals -> projects -> tasks. Uses workState from store. Back button navigation. Parchment styling.
definition_of_done: ProjectsPanel.tsx exists and exports from panels/index.ts
Goal list shows all goals with status and project counts
Clicking a goal shows its projects with progress
Back button works at each level
Handles empty state

initiatives.title: Build Intel panel (full report browser)
initiatives.user_scenario: CEO opens Intel tab and sees ALL reports chronologically. Click any to read full content. Back to return.
initiatives.scope: Create IntelPanel.tsx. Report list (all, not limited to 5) + detail view via artifact-content API. Active directive section. Back button.
definition_of_done: IntelPanel.tsx exists and exports from panels/index.ts
Shows ALL reports, not limited to 5
Click loads and displays full content
Back button returns to list
Active directive progress shown if exists

initiatives.title: Build Wiki panel (lessons knowledge browser)
initiatives.user_scenario: CEO opens Wiki tab and sees lesson topics. Click any to read full content. Back to return.
initiatives.scope: Create WikiPanel.tsx. Topic list from workState.conductor.lessons + detail view via artifact-content API. Back button.
definition_of_done: WikiPanel.tsx exists and exports from panels/index.ts
Shows all lesson topics from store
Click loads and displays full content
Back button returns to list
Handles empty state

initiatives.title: Remove old DecisionsPanel and ReportsPanel references
initiatives.user_scenario: Codebase is clean — no dead code from old 3-tab system.
initiatives.scope: Remove DecisionsPanel and ReportsPanel if unused. Update index.ts exports. Remove old tile types. Clean imports.
definition_of_done: No imports of old panels remain
index.ts exports new panels
No old hud-decisions/hud-reports references
TypeScript compiles clean
